creator: fenner@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks!  In the future, could you please: 
1) submit changes as diffs -- even though diffs of diffs are often 
hard to read, when the changes are straightforward like this it's 
much nicer. 
2) submit the changes with the PR - unfortunately, for some reason 
the web search from was unable to find the email you referenced so 
I had to go digging in the individual archive files; it's much 
easier if all the data is all in one place. 

Thanks again!
